rationale: CI documentation linting improvement for BSON library; no driver behavior or spec rule involved.
Compile time performance investigation; internal build tooling, no spec conformance issue.
Fuzzer-detected integer overflow panic in BSON deserialization; crash bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
list_collections fails when timeseries collections present; driver struct doesn't handle type=timeseries as time-series spec requires.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-1030; proactive spec-rollout, driver was not wrong before.
Adding command logging spec test for unacknowledged write behavior; issue split from DRIVERS-2525, test infrastructure update.
Flaky CI test failure; test stability issue, no spec conformance involvement.
Adding Ping assertion to initial DNS spec tests; issue split from DRIVERS-2234, spec test update.
Driver requires errmsg in write concern errors but spec says it's optional; spec PR #1367 adds a test for this.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2548; resolved as Done (no code change), investigation only.
ObjectId::new() panics on wasm due to platform limitation; wasm compatibility issue, not a spec rule violation.
CI addition to ensure BSON compiles on wasm; build infrastructure, no spec conformance involved.
Flaky CSFLE test due to libmongocrypt initialization race condition; timing/CI issue, not a spec rule violation.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2286; proactive spec-rollout for range indexes, driver not previously wrong.
Adding withTransaction API example code; documentation task, not a spec conformance fix.
Adding parse_async method for API ergonomics when sync and async features coexist; no spec rule involved.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2209; proactive spec-rollout for FaaS handshake metadata, driver not previously wrong.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2530; proactive spec-rollout for session server selection behavior.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2524; proactive spec-rollout for QE v2 ECC collection handling.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2595; routine maxWireVersion bump for MongoDB 7.0, not a bug fix.
Bug + issue split from DRIVERS-2623; spec-compliance label; AWS Lambda FaaS detection logic too permissive, violates handshake spec detection criteria.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2411; proactive spec-rollout for Azure managed identity KMS credentials.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2377; proactive spec-rollout for GCP attached service accounts, resolved as Done.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2232; deprecating server commands, resolved as Done (investigation).
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-1671; proactive spec-rollout for server selection log messages.
SDAM spec defines exactly which hello response fields determine ServerDescription equality; driver checks extra non-spec fields causing spurious events.
Relaxing Rust trait bounds on Cursor Stream impl; language ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Bug + issue split from DRIVERS-2503; connectionId in heartbeats may be int64, driver mishandles type per SDAM/CMAP spec.
Bug + issue split from DRIVERS-2327 + spec-compliance label; retryable writes spec requires propagating original error for NoWritesPerformed label.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2546; time-series scalability feature, not a spec conformance bug.
Adding serde_with 3.x integration; third-party library dependency update, no spec involved.
CI fix for unstable Rust compiler options broken by Rust 1.70; build infrastructure, no spec involvement.
Pre-creating async drop cleanup tasks to handle runtime shutdown; internal async architecture improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Async drop tasks panic when tokio runtime is dropped; runtime lifecycle edge case, implementation bug with no contradicted spec rule.
MONGODB-AWS credential refresh: ECS/EC2 return expiration as string but driver only handles doubles; spec defines credential response format.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2674; backport of change streams >16MB handling, not a standalone driver bug.
Concurrent write latency bottleneck from user report; performance bug, no spec rule violated.
GridFS spec says chunk_size_bytes and n must be int32; Rust u32 serializes as int64, making files unreadable by other drivers.
SessionCursor::with_type panics due to moved state and subsequent unwrap; Rust-specific implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2570; proactive spec-rollout for container/Kubernetes awareness in handshake.
Removing defunct test mutex locks after switching to cargo-nextest; internal test tooling cleanup.
Delaying serialization in replace methods to avoid clone; internal performance optimization, no spec behavior change.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2666; standardizing performance testing infrastructure, not driver behavior.
Final cursor batch discarded; cursors spec requires all results returned. Empty description limits confidence.
Fixing redundant rustdoc link causing CI lint failure; documentation tooling issue, no spec involvement.
Bug + issue split from DRIVERS-2369 + spec-compliance label; sessions spec requires causal consistency disabled in implicit sessions.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-1571; proactive spec-rollout for retrying to different mongos, not a prior bug.
Bug + issue split from DRIVERS-2707; CMAP event duration requirement relaxed in spec, driver must update to match new spec behavior.
CI check to ensure BSON builds on wasm; build infrastructure, no spec conformance involved.
Memory leak from shutdown cleanup tracking added in 2.7.0; implementation resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
